allow: PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "stopped dev server PID $p" } else { "no server on 3001" })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "stopped PID $p" } else { "no server on 3001" })
